section.heading: Effective date
section.chapeau: The allowance under section 5622 of this title—

paragraph.content: shall be available beginning with the month of May 1997;
through the end of September 1997, shall be paid from the applicable accounts of the House of Representatives on a pro rata basis; and
beginning with fiscal year 1998, shall be paid as provided in appropriations Acts.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 74d–2 of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
Section is based on section 2 of House Resolution No. 130, One Hundred Fifth Congress, Apr. 24, 1997, which was enacted into permanent law by Pub. L. 105–55.
